notes: Mean normalized reward (higher is better) vs. simulator-sample budget, DRAM memory-controller design (DRAMGym, DRAMSys). Programmatic digitization of the native 8187x3237 embedded raster in the arXiv 2306.08888v1 PDF (DOI 10.1145/3579371.3589049): per-family color masks, axis calibration via the five y-tick bands (fit residual <= 0.0017 reward units), plotted-whisker extents from pixels. The discussion surrounding Figure 7 does not state the normalization reference, aggregation population, or whisker statistic. Reading uncertainty ~ +/-0.003 reward units; values are transcriptions of the published figure at plotted resolution, not raw data (oss-arch-gym repo checked 2026-07-13, no numeric result artifacts). Accessed 2026-07-13.
